title: Rivian Q2 2024 Earnings Preview and Analyst Expectations
text: Rivian was set to announce Q2 2024 earnings results with an EPS estimate of -$1.19 and a revenue estimate of $1.15B. However, analysts expected Rivian to report a loss of $1.24 per share for Q2 2024, greater than the loss of $1.08 per share in the prior-year quarter. Bullish analysts were impressed with RIVN's better-than-expected delivery numbers for Q2 and noted that the company's financial outlook had improved, thanks to stronger gross margins and reduced operating expenses. Analysts believed that Rivian's $5 billion partnership with Volkswagen underscores the company's technological advancement and strategic growth. Bears remained concerned about Rivian's unchanged 2024 production outlook, hinting at demand issues. While Rivian secured about $5 billion in new liquidity from Volkswagen, $3 billion of it would dilute existing shares. Rivian delivered 13,790 vehicles in the second quarter, up slightly from the first three months of the year (13,588). The company was scheduled to announce Q2 earnings results on Tuesday, August 6th, after market close.
